index_name: FnGuide AI Semiconductor TOP2 Plus Index

required_datasets.name: methodology_spec
required_datasets.purpose: Executable KSS methodology rules and PDF-backed status.

required_datasets.name: rebalance_calendar
required_datasets.purpose: Date alignment for universe, selection metrics, and target weights.

required_datasets.name: eligibility_flags
required_datasets.purpose: Methodology exclusions such as non-common shares, suspended names, and managed issues.

required_datasets.name: market_snapshot
required_datasets.purpose: Top2 and fill-bucket ranking plus residual weighting.

required_datasets.name: selection_metrics
required_datasets.purpose: Momentum bucket ranking after top2 exclusion.

required_datasets.name: etf_holdings_snapshot
required_datasets.purpose: Secondary validation evidence when official targets are absent.
